            for j in range(4):
                if 42 <= 42+i <= 45 and 8 <= 8+j <= 15:
                    if new_frame[42+i][8+j] == 14:
                        new_frame[42+i][8+j] = 2
                    elif new_frame[42+i][8+j] == 2:
                        new_frame[42+i][8+j] = 14
                        
    elif action == "ACTION5":
        # ACTION5: No changes observed in examples, so no-op
        pass
        
    elif action == "ACTION6":
        # ACTION6: Click at coordinates (x,y) - change cell to color 3
        if xy is not None:
            x, y = xy
            new_frame[y][x] = 3
            
    elif action == "ACTION7":
        # ACTION7: No changes observed in examples, so no-op
        pass
        
    return new_frame
